metadata.description: Skills + Subagents for Claude Code - Progressive skills for quick wins, orchestrated agents for full agentic coding

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Skills + Subagents for backend development - Use skills for coding guidance, or run recipe workflows for full orchestrated agentic coding with specialized agents

plugins.name: dev-workflows-frontend
plugins.description: Skills + Subagents for React/TypeScript - Use skills for coding guidance, or run recipe workflows for full orchestrated agentic coding with specialized agents

plugins.name: dev-skills
plugins.description: Lightweight skills for users with existing workflows - coding best practices, testing principles, and design guidelines without recipe workflows or agents

plugins.name: metronome
plugins.description: Detects shortcut-taking behavior and guides Claude to follow procedures step by step

plugins.name: discover
plugins.description: Turns feature ideas into evidence-backed PRDs through structured discovery, 4 Risks assessment, and validation workflows

plugins.name: linear-prism
plugins.description: Turns requirements into structured Linear tasks — validates before decomposing, so downstream design starts clean

plugins.name: dev-ext
plugins.description: Development lifecycle extensions — PR creation, browser QA, session memory (context-keeper/scouter), and CLAUDE.md generation. Install alongside dev-workflows or dev-workflows-frontend.

plugins.name: env-guard
plugins.description: Prevents Claude Code from reading or leaking sensitive files — .env, credentials, SSH keys, and secrets — via enforced PreToolUse hooks
